scenarios.description: visitor is null triggers Validate.notNull(visitor) exception at entry
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Node();

scenarios.description: root is null triggers Validate.notNull(root) exception at entry
single-node tree yields one head and one tail call with no children
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called once with (root,0) and visitor.tail called once with (root,0)
pseudocode: Node root = new Node(); NodeVisitor visitor = spy that records calls;

scenarios.description: two-level tree descends into child then ascends and visits sibling absence
scenarios.precondition: root has one child only; visitor records sequence
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called on root(0), child(1); visitor.tail on child(1), root(0)
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("p"); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = spy;

scenarios.description: deep nested three-level tree covers multiple descents (loop-N)
scenarios.precondition: root with depth 3; visitor records depth parameter
scenarios.expectedResult: head called at depths 0,1,2,3 and tail likewise
pseudocode: Node root = buildTreeDepth(3); NodeVisitor visitor = spy;

scenarios.description: visitor.head removes child at depth>0 triggers remove branch and skip tail for removed
scenarios.precondition: root with one child; visitor.head(node,depth) calls node.remove() when depth==1
scenarios.expectedResult: head called twice (root,child); tail called once for root only
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("p"); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = stub that on head(node,depth) if depth==1 calls node.remove();

scenarios.description: visitor.head replaces child triggers replace branch path
scenarios.precondition: root with one child; visitor.head(node,depth) replaces child with a new node
scenarios.expectedResult: head called on new replacement and original; tail called on replacement then root
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("p"); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = stub that on head(node,depth) if depth==1 calls node.replaceWith(new Element("span"));
assert visitor.tailNodes contains node of type "span";

scenarios.description: assertion enabled and node null triggers AssertionError at B15
scenarios.precondition: run with -ea; construct a scenario causing node==null at B14 (simulate by stub returning null on childNodeSize()>0 and childNode(0))
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = stub; Node root = spy Node whose childNodeSize()>0 but childNode(0) returns null;

scenarios.description: elements list is empty results in no traversal
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = spy; Elements elements = new Elements();

scenarios.description: elements list with one element invokes single-element traversal
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head/tail called exactly for that element tree
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Elements elements = new Elements(el); NodeVisitor visitor = spy;

scenarios.description: elements list traversal stops early when nested traverse throws STOP in filter overload
scenarios.precondition: testing filter overload triggers FilterResult.STOP in underlying traverse but not in this method
scenarios.expectedResult: completes without exception for single Elements
pseudocode: NodeFilter filter = stub that always returns STOP on head; Elements elements = new Elements(new Element("p"));
